;;;;;;;; PASS07: main dispatcher for the current held item. Uses !item_on_hand, the tile in front, held-item tables, and may route to shipping/bin/shop/special-place logic.
;;;;;;;; PASS07: 24-bit pointer table indexed by !item_on_hand*3. Points to graphics/placement metadata used while carrying/using items.
;;;;;;;; PASS07: indirect JSR table indexed by !item_on_hand*2. Entries point to held-item behavior routines in bank 81.
;;;;;;;; PASS07: two-byte table indexed by !item_on_hand*2. Low byte is tile/action value for placement; high byte is shipping value added to !shipping_money.
;;;;;;;; PASS07: 3-byte records indexed by !item_on_hand*3. Word=text id/dialog pointer; byte=sell value used by AddMoney for some direct-sale cases.

; If !shipping_moneyL/H is non-zero, uses text $031A (daily shipping total).

; This clears !tool_selected and !tool_backpack after OR-ing the corresponding

!item_on_hand = $091D ;8b PASS24: held item ID currently carried/used; zero means empty hands.
!tool_selected = $0921 ;8b PASS24: active tool slot selected from inventory/tool shed display.
!tool_backpack = $0923 ;8b PASS24: secondary/backpack tool slot used by inventory/tool-return flows.
!shipping_moneyL = $7F1F07 ;24-bit daily shipping accumulator low word. Added to wallet at night reset.
!moneyL = $7F1F04 ;wallet money low word. Used with !moneyH as 24-bit value.
!moneyL = $7F1F04 ;wallet money low word. Used with !moneyH as 24-bit value.
!moneyH = $7F1F06 ;wallet money high byte. AddMoney clamps wallet to $0F423F.
